scripts.favicon: npm run favicon:png && npm run favicon:ico
scripts.favicon:png: magick logo_source/logo.png -gravity center -extent 1024x1024 -resize 180x180 src/assets/images/favicon/apple-touch-icon.png && magick logo_source/logo.png -gravity center -extent 1024x1024 -resize 48x48 src/assets/images/favicon/favicon-48x48.png && magick logo_source/logo.png -gravity center -extent 1024x1024 -resize 32x32 src/assets/images/favicon/favicon-32x32.png && magick logo_source/logo.png -gravity center -extent 1024x1024 -resize 16x16 -unsharp 0x1 src/assets/images/favicon/favicon-16x16.png
